query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ad_alert_history` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `brandId` int NOT NULL,
  `version` int DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  `aiAnalysis` text NOT NULL,
  `totalGmv` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `totalImpressions` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `avgConversionRate` decimal(10, 4) DEFAULT 0,
  `totalLivestreams` int DEFAULT 0,
  `avgGmvPerLive` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `performanceScore` int DEFAULT 0,
  `missedImpressions` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `missedGmv` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `scenarios` json,
  `allocationLiveRatio` decimal(5, 2) DEFAULT 0.5,
  `allocationClipRatio` decimal(5, 2) DEFAULT 0.5,
  `allocationReason` text,
  `urgencyLevel` enum('high', 'medium', 'low') DEFAULT 'medium' NOT NULL,
  `createdBy` int NOT NULL,
  `createdByName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `ad_alert_history_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
